step_rationale: Cardiac stem/progenitor cell marker; reflects cardiomyocyte injury and reparative response.
mechanism: c-Kit+ cardiac progenitor cells mobilize in response to myocardial necrosis, contributing to post-MI remodeling and repair.

references.title: Circulating progenitor cells in stable coronary heart disease and acute coronary syndromes: relevant reparatory mechanism?
Regeneration of ischemic cardiac muscle and vascular endothelium by adult stem cells.

trials.title: Comparison Between Atorvastatin and Rosuvastatin in Reduction of Inflammatory Biomarkers in Patients With Acute Coronary Syndrome
